description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.8 Docker image. Define a single test job named test that runs in the default test stage and is limited to the master branch and tags. In the job script run apt-get update -y, apt-get install ruby -y, gem install dpl, go get github.com/constabulary/gb/... , go get -u github.com/golang/lint/golint, golint ./src/... , gb vendor restore, gb test -v, and finally deploy to Heroku with dpl --provider=heroku --app=msu-go-2017 --api-key=$HEROKU_PRODUCTION_API_KEY --skip_cleanup. No caches, artifacts, or services are defined.
